description: Regression floor for LongMemEval-S (18-item balanced pilot). Updates require an explicit `baseline-update:` commit-message tag; see docs/agent-memory/regression-protocol.md.
established_by: Pilot 7 — V3 prompt + multi-channel + synthesis + _abs-aware judge + anti-abstention prompt
notes: Update gate: nightly diff fails when any metric drops > tolerance below floor.
Per-category metrics are informational, not gating — single-session-assistant is a known structural 0/3 (extraction gaps).
The 0.144 gap from synth_judge=0.556 to the Phase 2 target of 0.70 requires one of three structural fixes (see ROADMAP_AGENT_MEMORY.md "Levers to close the 0.144 gap").
